RESTORE_ORDER.RESTORE_ORDER_MODAL_LABEL: This is an archived return order. You must restore this return order to make any changes.
RESTORE_ORDER.RESTORE_ORDER_MODAL_LABEL_FOR_ACTION: You must restore the return order to perform this action. Are you sure you want to restore this archived return order?
RESTORE_ORDER.RESTORE_ORDER_NOTIF_LABEL: Archived return order. Restore this return order to perform any action.
RESTORE_ORDER.RESTORE_ORDER_NOTIF_NOT_ALLOWED_LABEL: Archived return order. You do not have permission to restore this return order.
RESTORE_ORDER.RESTORE_ORDER_ERROR_MSG: Failed to restore the return order.
RESTORE_ORDER.RESTORE_ORDER_DISABLED_ACTION: This is an archived return order. You must restore this return order to perform this action.

REFUND_NOW.REFUND_NOW_SUCCESS: The invoice was created for {{totalAmount}}, and the refund was processed.
REFUND_NOW.INVOICE_CREATED_REFUND_FAILED: The invoice was created for {{totalAmount}}, but the refund was not processed.
REFUND_NOW.INVOICE_ALL_LINES: Invoice will be generated for all lines.
REFUND_NOW.INVOICE_NO_LINES: All lines display zero quantity and cannot be invoiced because they were either canceled or  previously invoiced.
REFUND_NOW.INVOICE_FEW_LINES: Lines that display zero quantity cannot be invoiced because they were either canceled or previously invoiced.
REFUND_NOW.REFUND_NOW_UNAVAILABLE_TOOLTIP: Refund cannot be initiated in the current order status.

RETURN_LINES.ADJUST_PRICING_TOOLTIP: Price adjusted icon is shown on the right side of the {{headerName}} if the order line has coupons, charges, or discounts applied.

RETURN_METHODS.MSG_CUSTOMER_CAN_KEEP_TABLE_HEADER_PLURA: Customer can keep the items and the amount will be refunded to the customer.
RETURN_METHODS.MSG_CUSTOMER_CAN_KEEP_TABLE_HEADER_SINGU: Customer can keep the item and the amount will be refunded to the customer.
RETURN_METHODS.MSG_PICK_UP_TABLE_HEADER_SINGULAR: The item will be picked up from the address mentioned above
RETURN_METHODS.MSG_PICK_UP_TABLE_HEADER_PLURAL: The items will be picked up from the address mentioned above
RETURN_METHODS.LABEL_VIEW_SHIPMENT_LINES: View return lines in this shipment
RETURN_METHODS.FULFILLMENT_LINES_SEARCH_PLACEHOLDER_TEX: Search by item ID or description
RETURN_METHODS.LABEL_ADJUST_PRICE_UNAVAILABLE_TOOLTIP: Price cannot be adjusted for the selected line.
RETURN_METHODS.OVERFLOW_MENU_BUNDLE_ACTION_INELIGIBLE_T: Action is not available for the bundle component.

PAYMENT_METHODS.MSG_NO_PAYMENT_ACTIVITY_DATA: Payment data is not yet available for this return order.
PAYMENT_METHODS.RESTORE_ORDER_DISABLED_ACTION: This is an archived order. You must restore this order to perform this action.
PAYMENT_METHODS.MSG_MODIFY_PAYMENT_NOT_ALLOWED_MOD: You cannot modify payment for the order in the current status.
PAYMENT_METHODS.LABEL_NO_PAYMENT_MSG: No payments methods are added to this order.
PAYMENT_METHODS.LABEL_VIEW_INVOICE_UNAVAILABLE_TOOLTIP: Invoice must be created before it can be viewed.
PAYMENT_METHODS.LABEL_VIEW_INVOICE_ARCHIVED_TOOLTIP: Invoices cannot be viewed for archived return orders. Restore the return order to view the invoices.
PAYMENT_METHODS.LABEL_PAYMENT_PROCESSING_ON_SALES_ORDER_: The refund will be processed for the original order
PAYMENT_METHODS.NOTIFICATION_PROCESS_ON_HOLD: Payment cannot be processed because this order or the associated order is on hold.

REVIEW_PAYMENT_ACTIVITY_MODAL.LABEL_UNAVAILABLE_PAYMENT_ACTIVITY: No payment transactions associated with this order.
REVIEW_PAYMENT_ACTIVITY_MODAL.NO_CHARGE_TRANSACTION_DETAILS: There are no charge transactions associated with this payment.

CHARGES_AND_REFUNDS_MODAL.LABEL_UNAVAILABLE_CHARGES_AND_REFUNDS: No charge or refund transactions associated with this order.

ADDITIONAL_LINE_DETAILS.LABEL_NO_IMPORTANT_EVENTS: No important events to display at this time.
ADDITIONAL_LINE_DETAILS.LABEL_NO_ADDITIONAL_DETAILS: No additional details are available for this order line.
ADDITIONAL_LINE_DETAILS.LABEL_NO_BUNDLED_COMPONENTS: No components are associated to the bundle.

CANCEL_RETURN_MODAL.CANCEL_UNAVAILABLE_TOOLTIP: Return cannot be canceled in the current status.
CANCEL_RETURN_MODAL.LABEL_STOP_DELIVERY_APPLIED: Stop delivery requested for {{ requestedQty }} quantity
CANCEL_RETURN_MODAL.TOOLTIP_MESSAGE: Order cannot be canceled in the current status.
CANCEL_RETURN_MODAL.LABEL_ACTION_NOT_ELIGIBLE: Order cannot be canceled because some order lines do not allow cancellation.
CANCEL_RETURN_MODAL.SOME_LINES_NOT_ELIGIBLE: Order cannot be canceled because some of the selected order lines do not allow cancellation.
CANCEL_RETURN_MODAL.NOTIF_SDR_APPLY_SUCCESS: Stop delivery request was created for the order lines. Refund will be processed later.
CANCEL_RETURN_MODAL.NOTIF_SDR_RESHIP_APPLY_SUCCESS: Order was partially canceled and stop delivery request was created for some order lines. Refund will be processed later.
CANCEL_RETURN_MODAL.NOTE_CANCEL_ENTIRE_ORDER: {{userNoteText}} The entire order was canceled due to reason: {{reasonShortDescription}}
CANCEL_RETURN_MODAL.NOTE_CANCEL_LINES: {{userNoteText}} The order line was canceled with {{qtyToCancel}} quantities due to reason: {{reasonShortDescription}}
CANCEL_RETURN_MODAL.NOTE_SDR: {{userNoteText}} Stop delivery request for {{qtyToCancel}} quantities was created for the order line due to reason: {{reasonShortDescription}}
CANCEL_RETURN_MODAL.LABEL_MODAL_ORDER_LINE_CANCEL_ADDITIONAL: However, if the refund payment method is lost, you can add it after canceling the return.

APPLY_HOLDS_MODAL.RESOLVE_HOLDS_UNAVAILABLE_TOOLTIP: Holds cannot be resolved in the current status.
